name: STV rule
description: A decoding rule involving the sequence STV to determine placement or key

name: cipher wheel
description: A rotating device used for encoding messages, referenced with page number 547.

name: ligni occulte
description: Hidden or secret writing material, possibly wood-based, mentioned on page 552.

name: alphabet

name: doubled letters
description: Each letter should be doubled to prevent misreading and false strikes

name: 19 letters
description: Recommended alphabet size to avoid duplication and confusion

description: Cited author of prior cryptographic work
